Class VaccineType

java.lang.Object
shelter.domain.VaccineType
All Implemented Interfaces:
Comparable<VaccineType>
public class VaccineType extends Object implements Comparable<VaccineType>
Represents a type of vaccine that can be administered to animals in the shelter system. Each vaccine type defines which species it applies to and how long it remains valid before a booster is required. Instances are managed through the vaccine type catalog.

  • Constructor Details

    • VaccineType

      public VaccineType(String id, String name, Species applicableSpecies, int validityDays)
      Reconstruction constructor for deserializing a VaccineType from persistent storage. This constructor accepts an explicit id so the original identifier is preserved when reloading the vaccine type catalog from CSV data.
      Parameters:
      id - the pre-existing unique identifier; must not be null or blank
      name - the name of the vaccine (e.g., "Rabies", "FVRCP"); must not be null or blank
      applicableSpecies - the species this vaccine applies to; must not be null
      validityDays - the number of days the vaccine remains valid; must be positive
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if any parameter is null, blank, or invalid

    • VaccineType

      public VaccineType(String name, Species applicableSpecies, int validityDays)
      Constructs a new VaccineType with the given name, applicable species, and validity period. A unique ID is generated automatically at construction time.
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the vaccine (e.g., "Rabies", "FVRCP"); must not be null or blank
      applicableSpecies - the species this vaccine applies to; must not be null
      validityDays - the number of days the vaccine remains valid; must be positive
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if any parameter is null, blank, or invalid

    • VaccineType

      public VaccineType(VaccineType other)
      Copy constructor that creates a new VaccineType with all field values copied from other. The copy shares the same ID, so it represents the same vaccine type definition.
      Parameters:
      other - the VaccineType instance to copy; must not be null

  • Method Details

    • getId

      public String getId()
      Returns the unique identifier of this vaccine type. The ID is generated automatically at construction time and never changes.
      Returns:
      the UUID string identifying this vaccine type

    • getName

      public String getName()
      Returns the name of this vaccine type.
      Returns:
      the vaccine type name

    • setName

      public void setName(String name)
      Updates the name of this vaccine type. Typically called by VaccineTypeCatalogService during an update operation.
      Parameters:
      name - the new name; must not be null or blank
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if name is null or blank

    • getApplicableSpecies

      public Species getApplicableSpecies()
      Returns the species this vaccine type applies to.
      Returns:
      the applicable Species

    • setApplicableSpecies

      public void setApplicableSpecies(Species applicableSpecies)
      Updates the applicable species of this vaccine type.
      Parameters:
      applicableSpecies - the new applicable species; must not be null
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if applicableSpecies is null

    • getValidityDays

      public int getValidityDays()
      Returns the number of days this vaccine remains valid before a booster is required.
      Returns:
      the validity period in days

    • setValidityDays

      public void setValidityDays(int validityDays)
      Updates the validity period of this vaccine type.
      Parameters:
      validityDays - the new validity period in days; must be positive
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if validityDays is not positive

    • compareTo

      public int compareTo(VaccineType other)
      Compares this vaccine type to another by name alphabetically.
      Specified by:
      compareTo in interface Comparable<VaccineType>
      Parameters:
      other - the other VaccineType to compare to
      Returns:
      a negative number if this name comes first, positive if later, zero if equal

    • equals

      public boolean equals(Object o)
      Returns true if the given object is a VaccineType with the same ID.
      Overrides:
      equals in class Object
      Parameters:
      o - the object to compare
      Returns:
      true if o is a VaccineType with the same ID

    • hashCode

      public int hashCode()
      Returns a hash code based on this vaccine type's unique ID. Consistent with equals(Object).
      Overrides:
      hashCode in class Object
      Returns:
      the hash code

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Returns a string representation of this vaccine type including its ID, name, species, and validity.
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object
      Returns:
      a human-readable description of this vaccine type
